global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: This ad promotes DriftPass for flexible travel booking.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: DriftPass title
elements.description: The word 'DriftPass' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top center, conveying the brand name.

elements.label: Booking message
elements.description: The text 'Book your next trip' is presented in a clear, medium-sized font, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Flexible options
elements.description: The phrase 'Flexible booking options' appears below the main message in a smaller font, providing additional information.

elements.label: Top left circle
elements.description: A small circular shape is located at the top left, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Bottom left circle
elements.description: A small circular shape is positioned at the bottom left, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Center square
elements.description: A square shape is located in the center, providing a geometric contrast to the circular elements.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center reads 'Try for free' in bold, inviting users to take action.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and playful, DriftPass, flexible booking options, Try for free
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, body text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
